case_title: JOSE SANCHEZ ET AL VS. ANGLELICA ORR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,502.00 FILED BY SANCHEZ, JOSE TRIA, VANESSA AS TO DEFENDANT ORR, ANGLELICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (NO FEE FOR SERVICE). SERVED OCT-03-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ORR, ANGLELICA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-06-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-06-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF JOSE SANCHEZ IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF VANESSA TRIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANGELICA ORR IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ, JOSE TRIA, VANESSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORR, ANGLELICA $8,225.50 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,300.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 12/16/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
